problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
